full_text:
Tang Bin (Ruzong) 唐彬 (儒宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tang Bin (唐彬), styledRuzong (儒宗). General of Jin who participated in the conquest of Wu. Described as fast as an elk. Tang Bin was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
